title: Thai Red Curry Fish
description: A spicy Thai-inspired dish featuring snapper in a flavorful red curry sauce.
instructions: Season snapper fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat coconut oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear snapper fillets for 2-3 minutes per side, then transfer to a baking sheet.
In the same skillet, add red curry paste and sauté for 1-2 minutes.
Add lime juice, fish sauce, and Thai basil to the skillet. Stir to combine.
Add sliced red bell pepper and Thai red chili to the skillet. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Place the skillet with the sauce over the snapper fillets in the oven.
Bake for 8-10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Serve immediately and garnish with additional Thai basil if desired.
